scripts.build: npm run build -w @v-oneprep/shared && npm run build -w @v-oneprep/api && npm run build -w @v-oneprep/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @v-oneprep/api && npm run lint -w @v-oneprep/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @v-oneprep/shared && npm run typecheck -w @v-oneprep/api && npm run typecheck -w @v-oneprep/web
